headline: The AI Evangelist Shaking Up a 220-Year-Old Toothpaste Maker
summary: Colgate-Palmolive turns to Iraklis “Kli” Pappas to drive employees toward using AI for more than just polishing emails.

headline: Fed’s Williams: too early to assess Iran war impact on US economy
summary: Investing.com -- It is too early to determine how the war with Iran will affect U.S. inflation and growth, but the American economy is less reliant on imported oil than in the past and has shown resilience to energy price shocks, New York Fed President John Williams said Tuesday.

headline: Russell 2000: how exposed is it to the Iran shock?
summary: Investing.com -- The Iran escalation has revived concerns about how small-cap U.S. equities may respond, with Bank of America saying the key risk is an oil-driven stagflation shock.

raw.headline: Russell 2000: how exposed is it to the Iran shock?

headline: History says this is the critical question for the S&P 500 over the next few days
summary: Investing.com -- The latest geopolitical situation and the resulting surge in oil prices have revived fears of a sustained risk-off move, but Deutsche Bank says history shows the equity outlook will depend on whether the current shock develops into something more severe.
